zh.Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯恩頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall於大約1262年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯恩頓時，他的父親Stephen Swynnerton34歲，母親Joan Ware24歲。他於大約1282年與Joan Hastang在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他在英國斯塔福爾斯恩頓被列為1st baron swynnerton。他去世於大約1298年在他的家鄉享年38歲。

zh-hans.Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯恩頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall于大约1262年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯恩頓时，他的父亲Stephen Swynnerton34岁，母亲Joan Ware24岁。他于大约1282年与Joan Hastang在英国斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他在英国斯塔福爾斯恩頓被列为1st baron swynnerton。他去世于大约1298年在他的家乡享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Swynnerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Swinnerton
meanings: English: habitational name from Swynnerton in Staffordshire. The etymology of the placename is uncertain. It may derive from Old English swille ‘sloppy mess, swill’ + ford ‘ford’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Alternatively, the first element may be swīn ‘swine, hog’, swān ‘herdsman, peasant’, swan ‘swan’, or sumor ‘summer’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall was born about 1262, in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Stephen Swynnerton, was 34 and his mother, Joan Ware, was 24. He married Joan Hastang about 1282, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. His occupation is listed as 1st baron swynnerton in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England. He died about 1298, in his hometown, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall est né environ 1262, à Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Stephen Swynnerton, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Joan Ware, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Joan Hastang environ 1282, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Sa profession de son indiquée est 1st baron swynnerton à Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé environ 1298, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall um 1262 in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Stephen Swynnerton 34 und seine Mutter Joan Ware 24. Er hat um 1282 in Staffordshire, England Joan Hastang geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. sein Beruf ist als 1st baron swynnerton in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England aufgeführt. Er starb um 1298 im Alter von 38 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall è nato il circa 1262 nel Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Stephen Swynnerton, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Joan Ware, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Joan Hastang circa 1282, nel Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. La sua occupazione è indicata come 1st baron swynnerton nel Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England. Morì circa 1298, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイア
ja.Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England: イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスウイネルトン
ja.lifeSummary: Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewallが約1262年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスウイネルトンで生まれた時，父Stephen Swynnertonは34歳，母Joan Wareは24歳であった。約1282年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでJoan Hastangと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。イギリススタフォードシュアイアスウイネルトンでの職業は1st baron swynnertonと記録されている。彼は約1298年に故郷で38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall(이)가 대략 1262년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스윈르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stephen Swynnerton(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Ware(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1282년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 Joan Hastang(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 스태퍼드실르 스윈르턴에서 1st baron swynnerton이었다. 그는 대략 1298년 그의 고향에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall nasceu aproximadamente 1262, em Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Stephen Swynnerton, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Joan Ware, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Hastang aproximadamente 1282, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Sua profissão aparece como 1st baron swynnerton em Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1298, em sua cidade natal, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall родился около 1262 г. в местности свинниртон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Stephen Swynnerton было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Ware, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Hastang около 1282 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь.  Он работал по профессии 1st baron swynnerton в местности свинниртон, стаффордшир, Англия. Он умер около 1298 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall nació aproximadamente 1262, en Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Stephen Swynnerton, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Joan Ware, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Joan Hastang aproximadamente 1282, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Su ocupación registrada era 1st baron swynnerton en Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Murió aproximadamente 1298, en su pueblo, a la edad de 38 años.
